theme: pit-crew robot arms servicing one car in parallel
title: Pit-Lane Arm Ballet: Minimal-Tick Service Plan
strategies: forward index-order ASAP list scheduling, earliest-arm-earliest-sector (greedy)
descendant-weighted priority list scheduling that frees the bottleneck sector first (strong)
true minimal-makespan resource-constrained schedule (open ceiling, NP-hard, uncovered)
